titleStmt.title: SII 8.486: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 486. (A.R. No. 187 of 1903). ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīrakṛṣṇayadevamahārā yaṟkuc cellum śakābdam 1000 4 100 3 10 2- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa pramodūtasamvatsara ttu karkkaṭaka nā yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu deśa miyumThe record is partially built in.
kāḷattiāṉa mummuṭicoḻapurattu nāyanār tirukkāḷattiuṭaiya nāyanār koyil śrīpaṇṭārakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷom velañceṟuuṭaiyār tukkaṇar piccappiḷḷaikku dharmmaśāsa nam paṇṇikkuṭuttappaṭi . tām Iraṇṭām piṟa
ṇāmuttinayiṉār Amutuceytaruḷumpaṭikku nāyanār tevatāṉamāṉa ciṭṭattūril mantirikuḷattukku Iṭṭa � 8 100 Inta paṇam Eṇṇūṟṟukkum ciṟukuḻi veṭṭuvittu nilamum tirutti Inta Erikiḻil piṟanta mutal koṇṭu Iṉnayinār Amutuceytaruḷa nāḷ Oṉṟukku ciṟukālaicantiyi�
Āḻākkum kaṟiamutu tayiramutum cāttiaruḷat tirumālai Oraṇaiyum caṉṉatiyil pakal Iṭum tiruviḷakku Oṉṟum Irātri (ri) Iṭum tiruviḷakku nālum nāḷtoṟum tappāmal candrāditya varai naṭattakkaṭavomākavum dharmmakarttā vukku nālattoṉṟukku varum prasāta m nāḻiyum tammiṭa sa
mpalattu kaiyilāyamuṭaiyārum Ivar vaṟkattārum naṭattakkaṭavarkaḷāka nicceyittukkuṭutteṉ paṉaippa ttil maruttuvaṉ tūḷiāḻvāṉ periyauṭaiyāṉeṉ . Itu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai .. Inta naṉtavaṉattu Ūrviṉivokattukku Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku Ivvūr Ūravaṟku Iraṇṭu paṇamThe record is built in at the right end.
Digital edition of SII 8.486 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
